seoTitle: Coolringdon vs Coolumburra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coolringdon and Coolumburra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coolringdon and Coolumburra.
heading: Coolringdon vs Coolumburra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coolringdon, New South Wales and Coolumburra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coolumburra has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Coolringdon (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coolringdon or Coolumburra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coolringdon has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Coolumburra scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coolringdon scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Coolumburra scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coolringdon or Coolumburra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coolumburra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
